change_comments.message:
The chart cannot be deployed.
It fails with the failure:
```
root@control01-daily-master-sm:/opt/oom/kubernetes# helm upgrade -i onap-portal-ng local/portal-ng --namespace onap --version 13.0.1 --values /opt/oom/kubernetes/onap/values.yaml --values /opt/oom/kubernetes/onap/resources/overrides/onap-all-ingress-gatewayapi.yaml --values /opt/oom/kubernetes/onap/resources/overrides/environment.yaml --values /home/ubuntu/oom/master/onap-overrides.yaml --timeout '900s'
Release "onap-portal-ng" does not exist. Installing it now.
coalesce.go:286: warning: cannot overwrite table with non table for mongodb.service.ports (map[mongodb:27017])
coalesce.go:286: warning: cannot overwrite table with non table for mongodb.service.ports (map[mongodb:27017])
Error: create: failed to create: Secret "sh.helm.release.v1.onap-portal-ng.v1" is invalid: data: Too long: must have at most 1048576 bytes
```
